tEn: SoundStream: An End-to-End Neural Audio Codec
tZh: SoundStream: 一种端到端神经音频编解码器
sEn: SoundStream is a neural audio codec that efficiently compresses speech, music, and general audio at low bitrates, outperforming traditional codecs like Opus and approaching EVS quality.
sZh: SoundStream是一种神经音频编解码器，能以低比特率高效压缩语音、音乐和通用音频，性能优于Opus等传统编解码器，接近EVS质量。
absEn: We present SoundStream, a novel neural audio codec that can efficiently compress speech, music and general audio at bitrates normally targeted by speech-tailored codecs. SoundStream relies on a model architecture composed by a fully convolutional encoder/decoder network and a residual vector quantizer, which are trained jointly end-to-end. Training leverages recent advances in text-to-speech and speech enhancement, which combine adversarial and reconstruction losses to allow the generation of high-quality audio content from quantized embeddings. By training with structured dropout applied to quantizer layers, a single model can operate across variable bitrates from 3kbps to 18kbps, with a negligible quality loss when compared with models trained at fixed bitrates. In addition, the model is amenable to a low latency implementation, which supports streamable inference and runs in real time on a smartphone CPU. In subjective evaluations using audio at 24kHz sampling rate, SoundStream at 3kbps outperforms Opus at 12kbps and approaches EVS at 9.6kbps. Moreover, we are able to perform joint compression and enhancement either at the encoder or at the decoder side with no additional latency, which we demonstrate through background noise suppression for speech.
absZh: 我们提出了SoundStream，一种新颖的神经音频编解码器，能够以通常针对语音的比特率高效压缩语音、音乐和通用音频。SoundStream依赖于由全卷积编码器/解码器网络和残差向量量化器组成的模型架构，两者通过端到端联合训练。训练利用了文本到语音和语音增强领域的最新进展，结合对抗损失和重建损失，从量化嵌入生成高质量音频内容。通过对量化器层应用结构化丢弃训练，单个模型可以在3kbps到18kbps的可变比特率下运行，与固定比特率训练的模型相比质量损失可忽略不计。此外，该模型支持低延迟实现，支持流式推理，并在智能手机CPU上实时运行。在24kHz采样率的音频主观评估中，3kbps的SoundStream优于12kbps的Opus，接近9.6kbps的EVS。此外，我们能够在编码器或解码器端进行联合压缩和增强，而无需额外延迟，通过语音背景噪声抑制进行了演示。

contrib.en: Proposes SoundStream, a neural audio codec trained end-to-end with adversarial and reconstruction losses for superior audio quality.
contrib.zh: 提出SoundStream，一种端到端训练的神经音频编解码器，结合对抗损失和重建损失以实现卓越音频质量。

contrib.en: Introduces a residual vector quantizer with quantizer dropout for bitrate scalability from 3 to 18 kbps.
contrib.zh: 引入带量化器dropout的残差向量量化器，实现3至18 kbps的比特率可扩展性。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that learning the encoder significantly improves coding efficiency over fixed mel-spectrogram features.
contrib.zh: 证明学习编码器相比固定梅尔频谱特征显著提升编码效率。

contrib.en: Shows SoundStream outperforms Opus and EVS across a wide range of bitrates in subjective evaluations.
contrib.zh: 在主观评估中，SoundStream在广泛比特率范围内优于Opus和EVS。

contrib.en: Supports streamable inference with low latency, running in real-time on a smartphone CPU.
contrib.zh: 支持低延迟流式推理，在智能手机CPU上实时运行。

contrib.en: Enables joint compression and enhancement without additional latency, demonstrated via background noise suppression.
contrib.zh: 实现无额外延迟的联合压缩与增强，通过背景噪声抑制演示。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to 24 kHz sampling rate; performance at higher rates not explored.
limits.zh: 评估限于24 kHz采样率，未探索更高采样率下的性能。

limits.en: Subjective tests use crowd-sourced MUSHRA methodology, which may introduce variability.
limits.zh: 主观测试采用众包MUSHRA方法，可能引入变异性。

limits.en: Joint compression and enhancement only demonstrated for background noise suppression; other enhancements not tested.
limits.zh: 联合压缩与增强仅针对背景噪声抑制演示，未测试其他增强类型。

limits.en: Model complexity and memory requirements may limit deployment on very low-resource devices.
limits.zh: 模型复杂度和内存需求可能限制在极低资源设备上的部署。

limits.en: Bitrate scalability relies on quantizer dropout; performance at extreme bitrates (e.g., below 3 kbps) not evaluated.
limits.zh: 比特率可扩展性依赖量化器dropout，未评估极端比特率（如低于3 kbps）下的性能。

items.en: We present SoundStream, a novel neural audio codec that can efficiently compress speech, music and general audio at bitrates normally targeted by speech-tailored codecs. SoundStream relies on a model architecture composed by a fully convolutional encoder/decoder network and a residual vector quantizer, which are trained jointly end-to-end. Training leverages recent advances in text-to-speech and speech enhancement, which combine adversarial and reconstruction losses to allow the generation of high-quality audio content from quantized embeddings. By training with structured dropout applied to quantizer layers, a single model can operate across variable bitrates from 3 kbps to 18 kbps, with a negligible quality loss when compared with models trained at fixed bitrates. In addition, the model is amenable to a low latency implementation, which supports streamable inference and runs in real time on a smartphone CPU. In subjective evaluations using audio at 24 kHz sampling rate, SoundStream at 3 kbps outperforms Opus at 12 kbps and approaches EVS at 9.6 kbps. Moreover, we are able to perform joint compression and enhancement either at the encoder or at the decoder side with no additional latency, which we demonstrate through background noise suppression for speech.
items.zh: 我们提出SoundStream，一种新颖的神经音频编解码器，能够以通常针对语音的比特率高效压缩语音、音乐和通用音频。SoundStream依赖于由全卷积编码器/解码器网络和残差向量量化器组成的模型架构，两者通过端到端联合训练。训练利用了文本到语音和语音增强的最新进展，结合对抗损失和重构损失，从而能够从量化嵌入生成高质量音频内容。通过对量化器层应用结构化丢弃训练，单个模型可以在3 kbps到18 kbps的可变比特率下运行，与在固定比特率下训练的模型相比，质量损失可忽略不计。此外，该模型适用于低延迟实现，支持流式推理，并在智能手机CPU上实时运行。在使用24 kHz采样率音频的主观评估中，3 kbps的SoundStream优于12 kbps的Opus，并接近9.6 kbps的EVS。此外，我们能够在编码器或解码器侧进行联合压缩和增强，而无需额外延迟，我们通过语音背景噪声抑制进行了演示。

items.en: Audio codecs can be partitioned into two broad categories: waveform codecs and parametric codecs. Waveform codecs aim at producing at the decoder side a faithful reconstruction of the input audio samples. In most cases, these codecs rely on transform coding techniques: a (usually invertible) transform is used to map an input time-domain waveform to the time-frequency domain. Then, transform coefficients are quantized and entropy coded. At the decoder side the transform is inverted to reconstruct a time-domain waveform. Often the bit allocation at the encoder is driven by a perceptual model, which determines the quantization process. Generally, waveform codecs make little or no assumptions about the type of audio content and can thus operate on general audio. As a consequence of this, they produce very high-quality audio at medium-to-high bitrates, but they tend to introduce coding artifacts when operating at low bitrates. Parametric codecs aim at overcoming this problem by making specific assumptions about the source audio to be encoded (in most cases, speech) and introducing strong priors in the form of a parametric model that describes the audio synthesis process. The encoder estimates the parameters of the model, which are then quantized. The decoder generates a time-domain waveform using a synthesis model driven by quantized parameters. Unlike waveform codecs, the goal is not to obtain a faithful reconstruction on a sample-by-sample basis, but rather to generate audio that is perceptually similar to the original.
items.zh: 音频编解码器可分为两大类：波形编解码器和参数编解码器。波形编解码器旨在解码器侧对输入音频样本进行忠实重建。大多数情况下，这些编解码器依赖于变换编码技术：使用（通常是可逆的）变换将输入时域波形映射到时频域。然后，对变换系数进行量化和熵编码。在解码器侧，逆变换重建时域波形。通常，编码器中的比特分配由感知模型驱动，该模型决定量化过程。一般来说，波形编解码器对音频内容的类型很少或没有假设，因此可以处理通用音频。因此，它们在中高比特率下产生非常高质量的音频，但在低比特率下往往引入编码伪影。参数编解码器旨在通过对待编码的源音频（大多数情况下是语音）做出特定假设，并以描述音频合成过程的参数模型形式引入强先验，从而克服这一问题。编码器估计模型参数，然后进行量化。解码器使用由量化参数驱动的合成模型生成时域波形。与波形编解码器不同，其目标不是逐样本忠实重建，而是生成感知上与原始音频相似的音频。

items.en: Traditional waveform and parametric codecs rely on signal processing pipelines and carefully engineered design choices, which exploit in-domain knowledge on psycho-acoustics and speech synthesis to improve coding efficiency. More recently, machine learning models have been successfully applied in the field of audio compression, demonstrating the additional value brought by data-driven solutions. For example, it is possible to apply them as a post-processing step to improve the quality of existing codecs. This can be accomplished either via audio superresolution, i.e., extending the frequency bandwidth [1], via audio denoising, i.e., removing lossy coding artifacts [2], or via packet loss concealment [3].
items.zh: 传统的波形和参数编解码器依赖于信号处理流程和精心设计的工程选择，利用心理声学和语音合成领域的知识来提高编码效率。最近，机器学习模型已成功应用于音频压缩领域，展示了数据驱动解决方案的附加价值。例如，可以将其作为后处理步骤应用于提高现有编解码器的质量。这可以通过音频超分辨率（即扩展频率带宽[1]）、音频去噪（即去除有损编码伪影[2]）或丢包隐藏[3]来实现。

items.en: Other solutions adopt ML-based models as an integral part of the audio codec architecture. In these areas, recent advances in text-to-speech (TTS) technology proved to be a key ingredient. For example, WaveNet [4], a strong generative model originally applied to generate speech from text, was adopted as a decoder in a neural codec [5, 6]. Other neural audio codecs adopt different model architectures, e.g., WaveRNN in LPCNet [7] and WaveGRU in Lyra [8], all targeting speech at low bitrates.
items.zh: 其他解决方案采用基于ML的模型作为音频编解码器架构的组成部分。在这些领域，文本到语音（TTS）技术的最新进展被证明是关键因素。例如，WaveNet [4]最初用于从文本生成语音，后来被用作神经编解码器[5, 6]中的解码器。其他神经音频编解码器采用不同的模型架构，例如LPCNet [7]中的WaveRNN和Lyra [8]中的WaveGRU，均针对低比特率语音。

items.capEn: Figure 2: SoundStream model architecture. A convolutional encoder produces a latent representation of the input audio samples, which is quantized using a variable number nqsubscript𝑛𝑞n_{q} of residual vector quantizers (RVQ). During training, the model parameters are optimized using a combination of reconstruction and adversarial losses. An optional conditioning input can be used to indicate whether background noise has to be removed from the audio. When deploying the model, the encoder and quantizer on a transmitter client send the compressed bitstream to a receiver client that can then decode the audio signal.
items.capZh: 图2：SoundStream模型架构。卷积编码器产生输入音频样本的潜在表示，使用可变数量nq的残差向量量化器（RVQ）进行量化。训练期间，模型参数通过重构损失和对抗损失的组合进行优化。可选的条件输入可用于指示是否应从音频中去除背景噪声。部署模型时，发送端客户端上的编码器和量化器将压缩的比特流发送到接收端客户端，然后解码音频信号。

items.en: In this paper we propose SoundStream, a novel audio codec that can compress speech, music and general audio more efficiently than previous codecs, as illustrated in Figure 1. SoundStream leverages state-of-the-art solutions in the field of neural audio synthesis, and introduces a new learnable quantization module, to deliver audio at high perceptual quality, while operating at low-to-medium bitrates. Figure 2 illustrates the high level model architecture of the codec. A fully convolutional encoder receives as input a time-domain waveform and produces a sequence of embeddings at a lower sampling rate, which are quantized by a residual vector quantizer. A fully convolutional decoder receives the quantized embeddings and reconstructs an approximation of the original waveform. The model is trained end-to-end using both reconstruction and adversarial losses. To this end, one (or more) discriminators are trained jointly, with the goal of distinguishing the decoded audio from the original audio and, as a by-product, provide a space where a feature-based reconstruction loss can be computed. Both the encoder and the decoder only use causal convolutions, so the overall architectural latency of the model is determined solely by the temporal resampling ratio between the original time-domain waveform and the embeddings.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出SoundStream，一种新颖的音频编解码器，能够比以前的编解码器更高效地压缩语音、音乐和通用音频，如图1所示。SoundStream利用神经音频合成领域的最先进解决方案，并引入新的可学习量化模块，以在中低比特率下提供高感知质量的音频。图2展示了编解码器的高级模型架构。全卷积编码器接收时域波形作为输入，并以较低采样率生成嵌入序列，由残差向量量化器量化。全卷积解码器接收量化嵌入并重建原始波形的近似。模型使用重构损失和对抗损失进行端到端训练。为此，联合训练一个（或多个）判别器，目标是区分解码音频与原始音频，并作为副产品，提供可以计算基于特征的重构损失的空间。编码器和解码器仅使用因果卷积，因此模型的整体架构延迟仅由原始时域波形与嵌入之间的时间重采样比决定。

items.en: In summary, this paper makes the following key contributions:
items.zh: 总之，本文做出以下关键贡献：

items.en: We propose SoundStream, a neural audio codec in which all the constituent components (encoder, decoder and quantizer) are trained end-to-end with a mix of reconstruction and adversarial losses to achieve superior audio quality.
items.zh: 我们提出SoundStream，一种神经音频编解码器，其中所有组成组件（编码器、解码器和量化器）通过重构损失和对抗损失的混合进行端到端训练，以实现卓越的音频质量。

items.en: We introduce a new residual vector quantizer, and investigate the rate-distortion-complexity trade-offs implied by its design. In addition, we propose a novel “quantizer dropout” technique for training the residual vector quantizer, which enables a single model to handle different bitrates.
items.zh: 我们引入了一种新的残差向量量化器，并研究了其设计所隐含的率失真复杂度权衡。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的“量化器丢弃”技术用于训练残差向量量化器，使单个模型能够处理不同的比特率。

items.en: We demonstrate that learning the encoder brings a very significant coding efficiency improvement, with respect to a solution that adopts mel-spectrogram features.
items.zh: 我们证明，与采用梅尔频谱特征的解决方案相比，学习编码器带来了非常显著的编码效率提升。

items.en: We demonstrate by means of subjective quality metrics that SoundStream outperforms both Opus and EVS over a wide range of bitrates.
items.zh: 我们通过主观质量指标证明，SoundStream在广泛的比特率范围内优于Opus和EVS。

items.en: We design our model to support streamable inference, which can operate at low-latency. When deployed on a smartphone, it runs in real-time on a single CPU thread.
items.zh: 我们设计模型以支持流式推理，可在低延迟下运行。在智能手机上部署时，它在单个CPU线程上实时运行。

items.en: We propose a variant of the SoundStream codec that performs jointly audio compression and enhancement, without introducing additional latency.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种SoundStream编解码器的变体，可联合执行音频压缩和增强，而无需引入额外延迟。

items.en: Traditional audio codecs – Opus [9] and EVS [10] are state-of-the-art audio codecs, which combine traditional coding tools, such as LPC, CELP and MDCT, to deliver high coding efficiency over different content types, bitrates and sampling rates, while ensuring low-latency for real-time audio communications. We compare SoundStream with both Opus and EVS in our subjective evaluation.
items.zh: 传统音频编解码器——Opus [9]和EVS [10]是最先进的音频编解码器，结合了传统编码工具（如LPC、CELP和MDCT），在不同内容类型、比特率和采样率下提供高编码效率，同时确保实时音频通信的低延迟。我们在主观评估中将SoundStream与Opus和EVS进行了比较。

items.en: Audio generative models – Several generative models have been developed for converting text or coded features into audio waveforms. WaveNet [4] allows for global and local signal conditioning to synthesize both speech and music. SampleRNN [11] uses recurrent networks in a similar fashion, but it relies on previous samples at different scales. These auto-regressive models deliver very high-quality audio, at the cost of increased computational complexity, since samples are generated one by one. To overcome this issue, Parallel WaveNet [12] allows for parallel computation, yielding considerable speedup during inference. Other approaches involve lightweight and sparse models [13] and networks mimicking the fast Fourier transform as part of the model [14, 7]. More recently, generative adversarial models have emerged as a solution able to deliver high-quality audio with a lower computational complexity. MelGAN [15] is trained to produce audio waveforms when conditioned on mel-spectrograms, training a multi-scale waveform discriminator together with the generator. HiFiGAN [16] takes a similar approach but it applies discriminators to both multiple scales and multiple periods of the audio samples. The design of the decoder and the losses in SoundStream is based on this class of audio generative models.
items.zh: 音频生成模型——已经开发了几种生成模型，用于将文本或编码特征转换为音频波形。WaveNet [4]允许全局和局部信号条件来合成语音和音乐。SampleRNN [11]以类似方式使用循环网络，但依赖于不同尺度的先前样本。这些自回归模型提供非常高质量的音频，但计算复杂度较高，因为样本是逐个生成的。为了克服这个问题，Parallel WaveNet [12]允许并行计算，在推理时显著加速。其他方法涉及轻量级和稀疏模型[13]以及模拟快速傅里叶变换作为模型一部分的网络[14, 7]。最近，生成对抗模型已成为一种能够以较低计算复杂度提供高质量音频的解决方案。MelGAN [15]在条件于梅尔频谱时训练生成音频波形，与生成器一起训练多尺度波形判别器。HiFiGAN [16]采用类似方法，但将判别器应用于音频样本的多个尺度和多个周期。SoundStream中解码器和损失的设计基于这类音频生成模型。

items.en: Audio enhancement – Deep neural networks have been applied to different audio enhancement tasks, ranging from denoising [17, 18, 19, 20, 21] to dereverberation [22, 23], lossy coding denoising [2] and frequency bandwidth extension [24, 1]. In this paper we show that it is possible to jointly perform audio enhancement and compression with a single model, without introducing additional latency.
items.zh: 音频增强——深度神经网络已应用于不同的音频增强任务，从去噪[17, 18, 19, 20, 21]到去混响[22, 23]、有损编码去噪[2]和频率带宽扩展[24, 1]。在本文中，我们展示了可以使用单个模型联合执行音频增强和压缩，而无需引入额外延迟。

items.en: Vector quantization – Learning the optimal quantizer is a key element to achieve high coding efficiency. Optimal scalar quantization based on Lloyd’s algorithm [25] can be extended to a high-dimensional space via the generalized Lloyd algorithm (GLA) [26], which is very similar to k-means clustering [27]. In vector quantization [28], a point in a high-dimensional space is mapped onto a discrete set of code vectors. Vector quantization has been commonly used as a building block of traditional audio codecs [29]. For example, CELP [30] adopts an excitation signal encoded via a vector quantizer codebook. More recently, vector quantization has been applied in the context of neural network models to compress the latent representation of input features. For example, in variational autoencoders, vector quantization has been used to generate images [31, 32] and music [33, 34]. Vector quantization can become prohibitively expensive, as the size of the codebook grows exponentially when rate is increased. For this reason, structured vector quantizers [35, 36] (e.g., residual, product, lattice vector quantizers, etc.) have been proposed to obtain a trade-off between computational complexity and coding efficiency in traditional codecs. In SoundStream, we extend the learnable vector quantizer of VQ-VAE [31] and introduce a residual (a.k.a. multi-stage) vector quantizer, which is learned end-to-end with the rest of the model. To the best of the authors knowledge, this is the first time that this form of vector quantization is used in the context of neural networks and trained end-to-end with the rest of the model.
items.zh: 向量量化——学习最优量化器是实现高编码效率的关键要素。基于Lloyd算法[25]的最优标量量化可以通过广义Lloyd算法（GLA）[26]扩展到高维空间，该算法与k-means聚类[27]非常相似。在向量量化[28]中，高维空间中的点被映射到一组离散的码向量。向量量化通常用作传统音频编解码器[29]的构建块。例如，CELP [30]采用通过向量量化器码本编码的激励信号。最近，向量量化已应用于神经网络模型的上下文中，以压缩输入特征的潜在表示。例如，在变分自编码器中，向量量化已用于生成图像[31, 32]和音乐[33, 34]。随着比特率增加，码本大小呈指数增长，向量量化可能变得过于昂贵。因此，在传统编解码器中，结构化向量量化器[35, 36]（例如残差、乘积、格向量量化器等）被提出来在计算复杂度和编码效率之间取得权衡。在SoundStream中，我们扩展了VQ-VAE [31]的可学习向量量化器，并引入了残差（也称为多级）向量量化器，该量化器与模型其余部分端到端学习。据作者所知，这是这种形式的向量量化首次在神经网络上下文中使用，并与模型其余部分端到端训练。

items.en: Neural audio codecs – End-to-end neural audio codecs rely on data-driven methods to learn efficient audio representations, instead of relying on handcrafted signal processing components. Autoencoder networks with quantization of hidden features were applied to speech coding early on [37]. More recently, a more sophisticated deep convolutional network for speech compression was described in [38]. Efficient compression of audio using neural networks has been demonstrated in several works, mostly targeting speech coding at low bitrates. A VQ-VAE speech codec was proposed in [6], operating at 1.61.61.6\,kbps. Lyra [8] is a generative model that encodes quantized mel-spectrogram features of speech, which are decoded with an auto-regressive WaveGRU model to achieve state-of-the-art results at 333\,kbps. A very low-bitrate codec was proposed in [39] by decoding speech representations obtained via self-supervised learning. An end-to-end audio codec targeting general audio at high bitrates (i.e., above 646464\,kbps) was proposed in [40]. The model architecture adopts a residual coding pipeline, which consists of multiple autoencoding modules and a psycho-acoustic model is used to drive the loss function during training.
items.zh: 神经音频编解码器——端到端神经音频编解码器依赖数据驱动方法学习高效的音频表示，而不是依赖手工设计的信号处理组件。具有隐藏特征量化的自编码器网络早期已应用于语音编码[37]。最近，[38]描述了一种更复杂的深度卷积网络用于语音压缩。使用神经网络高效压缩音频已在多项工作中得到证明，主要针对低比特率语音编码。文献[6]提出了一种VQ-VAE语音编解码器，工作在1.6 kbps。Lyra [8]是一种生成模型，编码语音的量化梅尔频谱特征，并使用自回归WaveGRU模型解码，在3 kbps下取得了最先进的结果。文献[39]通过解码通过自监督学习获得的语音表示，提出了一种极低比特率编解码器。文献[40]提出了一种针对高比特率（即高于64 kbps）通用音频的端到端音频编解码器。模型架构采用残差编码流水线，由多个自编码模块组成，并使用心理声学模型驱动训练期间的损失函数。

items.en: Unlike [39] which specifically targets speech by combining speaker, phonetic and pitch embeddings, SoundStream does not make assumptions on the nature of the signal it encodes, and thus works for diverse audio content types. While [8] learns a decoder on fixed features, SoundStream is trained in an end-to-end fashion. Our experiments (see Section IV) show that learning the encoder increases the audio quality substantially. SoundStream achieves bitrate scalability, i.e., the ability of a single model to operate at different bitrates at no additional cost, thanks to its residual vector quantizer and to our original quantizer dropout training scheme (see Section III-C). This is unlike [38] and [40] which enforce a specific bitrate during training and require training a different model for each target bitrate. A single SoundStream model is able to compress speech, music and general audio, while operating at a 242424\,kHz sampling rate and low-to-medium bitrates (333\,kbps to 181818\,kbps in our experiments), in real time on a smartphone CPU. This is the first time that a neural audio codec is shown to outperform state-of-the-art codecs like Opus and EVS over this broad range of bitrates.
items.zh: 与[39]通过结合说话人、音素和音高嵌入专门针对语音不同，SoundStream不对其编码的信号性质做出假设，因此适用于多种音频内容类型。虽然[8]在固定特征上学习解码器，但SoundStream以端到端方式训练。我们的实验（见第四节）表明，学习编码器显著提高了音频质量。SoundStream实现了比特率可扩展性，即单个模型能够以零额外成本在不同比特率下运行，这得益于其残差向量量化器和我们原始的量化器丢弃训练方案（见第三节-C）。这与[38]和[40]不同，后者在训练期间强制执行特定比特率，并且需要为每个目标比特率训练不同的模型。单个SoundStream模型能够压缩语音、音乐和通用音频，同时在24 kHz采样率和中低比特率（在我们的实验中为3 kbps到18 kbps）下，在智能手机CPU上实时运行。这是首次证明神经音频编解码器在这一广泛比特率范围内优于Opus和EVS等最先进编解码器。

items.en: Joint compression and enhancement – Recent work has explored joint compression and enhancement. The work in [41] trains a speech enhancement system with a quantized bottleneck. Instead, SoundStream integrates a time-dependent conditioning layer, which allows for real-time controllable denoising. As we design SoundStream as a general-purpose audio codec, controlling when to denoise allows for encoding acoustic scenes and natural sounds that would be otherwise removed.
items.zh: 联合压缩与增强——近期工作探索了联合压缩与增强。文献[41]训练了一个带有量化瓶颈的语音增强系统。而SoundStream则集成了一个时间依赖的条件层，实现了实时可控的去噪。由于我们将SoundStream设计为通用音频编解码器，控制何时去噪可以编码那些否则会被去除的声学场景和自然声音。

items.en: We consider a single channel recording x∈ℝT𝑥superscriptℝ𝑇x\in\mathbb{R}^{T}, sampled at fssubscript𝑓𝑠f_{s}. The SoundStream model consists of a sequence of three building blocks, as illustrated in Figure 2:
items.zh: 我们考虑一个单通道录音 x∈ℝT，采样率为 f_s。SoundStream模型由三个构建模块序列组成，如图2所示：

items.en: an encoder, which maps x𝑥x to a sequence of embeddings (see Section III-A),
items.zh: 一个编码器，将 x 映射为嵌入序列（见第III-A节），

items.en: a residual vector quantizer, which replaces each embedding by the sum of vectors from a set of finite codebooks, thus compressing the representation with a target number of bits (see Section III-C),
items.zh: 一个残差向量量化器，将每个嵌入替换为来自一组有限码本的向量之和，从而以目标比特数压缩表示（见第III-C节），

items.en: a decoder, which produces a lossy reconstruction x^∈ℝT^𝑥superscriptℝ𝑇\hat{x}\in\mathbb{R}^{T} from quantized embeddings (see Section III-B).
items.zh: 一个解码器，从量化嵌入生成有损重建 x̂∈ℝT（见第III-B节）。

items.en: The model is trained end-to-end together with a discriminator (see Section III-D), using the mix of adversarial and reconstruction losses described in Section III-E. Optionally, a conditioning signal can be added, which determines whether denoising is applied at the encoder or decoder side, as detailed in Section III-F.
items.zh: 该模型与判别器（见第III-D节）一起端到端训练，使用第III-E节所述的对抗损失和重建损失的混合。可选地，可以添加条件信号，决定是否在编码器或解码器侧应用去噪，详见第III-F节。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Encoder and decoder model architecture.
items.capZh: 图3：编码器和解码器模型架构。

items.en: The encoder architecture is illustrated in Figure 3 and follows the same structure as the streaming SEANet encoder described in [1], but without skip connections. It consists of a 1D convolution layer (with Cencsubscript𝐶encC_{\text{enc}} channels), followed by Bencsubscript𝐵encB_{\text{enc}} convolution blocks. Each of the blocks consists of three residual units, containing dilated convolutions with dilation rates of 1, 3, and 9, respectively, followed by a down-sampling layer in the form of a strided convolution. The number of channels is doubled whenever down-sampling, starting from Cencsubscript𝐶encC_{\text{enc}}. A final 1D convolution layer with a kernel of length 3 and a stride of 1 is used to set the dimensionality of the embeddings to D𝐷D. To guarantee real-time inference, all convolutions are causal. This means that padding is only applied to the past but not the future in both training and offline inference, whereas no padding is used in streaming inference. We use the ELU activation [42] and we do not apply any normalization. The number Bencsubscript𝐵encB_{\text{enc}} of convolution blocks and the corresponding striding sequence determines the temporal resampling ratio between the input waveform and the embeddings. For example, when Benc=4subscript𝐵enc4B_{\text{enc}}=4 and using (2,4,5,8)2458(2,4,5,8) as strides, one embedding is computed every =/2⋅4⋅5⋅8=320=/2\cdot 4\cdot 5\cdot 8=320 input samples. Thus, the encoder outputs enc​(x)∈ℝS×Denc𝑥superscriptℝ𝑆𝐷\text{enc}(x)\in\mathbb{R}^{S\times D}, with S=T/S=T//.
items.zh: 编码器架构如图3所示，遵循文献[1]中流式SEANet编码器的相同结构，但没有跳跃连接。它由一个一维卷积层（C_enc通道）后跟B_enc个卷积块组成。每个块包含三个残差单元，分别使用膨胀率为1、3和9的膨胀卷积，后跟一个步长卷积形式的下采样层。每次下采样时通道数加倍，从C_enc开始。最后使用一个核长为3、步长为1的一维卷积层将嵌入维度设置为D。为保证实时推理，所有卷积都是因果的。这意味着在训练和离线推理中，填充仅应用于过去而非未来，而在流式推理中不使用填充。我们使用ELU激活函数[42]且不应用任何归一化。卷积块的数量B_enc和相应的步长序列决定了输入波形与嵌入之间的时间重采样比。例如，当B_enc=4且使用(2,4,5,8)作为步长时，每 /2·4·5·8=320 个输入样本计算一个嵌入。因此，编码器输出 enc(x)∈ℝ^{S×D}，其中 S=T/。

items.en: The decoder architecture follows a similar design, as illustrated in Figure 3. A 1D convolution layer is followed by a sequence of Bdecsubscript𝐵decB_{\text{dec}} convolution blocks. The decoder block mirrors the encoder block, and consists of a transposed convolution for up-sampling followed by the same three residual units. We use the same strides as the encoder, but in reverse order, to reconstruct a waveform with the same resolution as the input waveform. The number of channels is halved whenever up-sampling, so that the last decoder block outputs Cdecsubscript𝐶decC_{\text{dec}} channels. A final 1D convolution layer with one filter, a kernel of size 7 and stride 1 projects the embeddings back to the waveform domain to produce x^^𝑥\hat{x}. In Figure 3, the same number of channels in both the encoder and the decoder is controlled by the same parameter, i.e., Cenc=Cdec=Csubscript𝐶encsubscript𝐶dec𝐶C_{\text{enc}}=C_{\text{dec}}=C. We also investigate cases in which Cenc≠Cdecsubscript𝐶encsubscript𝐶decC_{\text{enc}}\neq C_{\text{dec}}, which results in a computationally lighter encoder and a heavier decoder, or vice-versa (see Section V-D).
items.zh: 解码器架构采用类似设计，如图3所示。一个一维卷积层后跟B_dec个卷积块序列。解码器块与编码器块镜像，包含一个用于上采样的转置卷积，后跟相同的三个残差单元。我们使用与编码器相同的步长，但顺序相反，以重建与输入波形相同分辨率的波形。每次上采样时通道数减半，因此最后一个解码器块输出C_dec个通道。最后使用一个具有一个滤波器、核大小为7、步长为1的一维卷积层将嵌入投影回波形域以产生 x̂。在图3中，编码器和解码器中相同的通道数由同一参数控制，即 C_enc=C_dec=C。我们还研究了 C_enc≠C_dec 的情况，这会导致计算量较轻的编码器和较重的解码器，或反之（见第V-D节）。

full.secZh: 三-C 残差矢量量化器

items.en: The goal of the quantizer is to compress the output of the encoder enc​(x)enc𝑥\text{enc}(x) to a target bitrate R𝑅R, expressed in bits/second (bps). In order to train SoundStream in an end-to-end fashion, the quantizer needs to be jointly trained with the encoder and the decoder by backpropagation. The vector quantizer (VQ) proposed in [31, 32] in the context of VQ-VAEs meets this requirement. This vector quantizer learns a codebook of N𝑁N vectors to encode each D𝐷D-dimensional frame of enc​(x)enc𝑥\text{enc}(x). The encoded audio enc​(x)∈ℝS×Denc𝑥superscriptℝ𝑆𝐷\text{enc}(x)\in\mathbb{R}^{S\times D} is then mapped to a sequence of one-hot vectors of shape S×N𝑆𝑁S\times N, which can be represented using S​log2⁡N𝑆subscript2𝑁S\log_{2}N bits.
items.zh: 量化器的目标是将编码器输出 enc(x) 压缩到目标比特率 R（以比特/秒(bps)表示）。为了端到端训练SoundStream，量化器需要通过反向传播与编码器和解码器联合训练。文献[31,32]在VQ-VAE背景下提出的向量量化器(VQ)满足这一要求。该向量量化器学习一个包含N个向量的码本，以编码 enc(x) 的每个D维帧。编码后的音频 enc(x)∈ℝ^{S×D} 然后被映射为形状为 S×N 的独热向量序列，可用 S log₂N 比特表示。

items.en: Limitations of Vector Quantization – As a concrete example, let us consider a codec targeting a bitrate R=6000𝑅6000R=6000\,bps. When using a striding factor =/320=/320, each second of audio at sampling rate fs=24000subscript𝑓𝑠24000f_{s}=24000\,Hz is represented by S=75𝑆75S=75 frames at the output of the encoder. This corresponds to r=6000/75=80𝑟60007580r=6000/75=80 bits allocated to each frame. Using a plain vector quantizer, this requires storing a codebook with N=280𝑁superscript280N=2^{80} vectors, which is obviously unfeasible.
items.zh: 向量量化的局限性——具体例子，考虑一个目标比特率 R=6000 bps 的编解码器。当使用步长因子 =/320 时，采样率 f_s=24000 Hz 的每秒音频在编码器输出端由 S=75 帧表示。这对应于每帧分配 r=6000/75=80 比特。使用普通向量量化器，需要存储一个包含 N=2^80 个向量的码本，这显然不可行。

items.en: Residual Vector Quantizer – To address this issue we adopt a Residual Vector Quantizer (a.k.a. multi-stage vector quantizer [36]), which cascades Nqsubscript𝑁𝑞N_{q} layers of VQ as follows. The unquantized input vector is passed through a first VQ and quantization residuals are computed. The residuals are then iteratively quantized by a sequence of additional Nq−1subscript𝑁𝑞1N_{q}-1 vector quantizers, as described in Algorithm 1. The total rate budget is uniformly allocated to each VQ, i.e., ri=r/Nq=log2⁡Nsubscript𝑟𝑖𝑟subscript𝑁𝑞subscript2𝑁r_{i}=r/N_{q}=\log_{2}N. For example, when using Nq=8subscript𝑁𝑞8N_{q}=8, each quantizer uses a codebook of size N=2r/Nq=280/8=1024𝑁superscript2𝑟subscript𝑁𝑞superscript28081024N=2^{r/N_{q}}=2^{80/8}=1024. For a target rate budget r𝑟r, the parameter Nqsubscript𝑁𝑞N_{q} controls the tradeoff between computational complexity and coding efficiency, which we investigate in Section V-D.
items.zh: 残差向量量化器——为解决此问题，我们采用残差向量量化器（又称多级向量量化器[36]），它级联N_q层VQ如下：未量化的输入向量通过第一个VQ，并计算量化残差。然后残差由后续N_q-1个向量量化器迭代量化，如算法1所述。总速率预算均匀分配给每个VQ，即 r_i=r/N_q=log₂N。例如，当使用N_q=8时，每个量化器使用大小为 N=2^{r/N_q}=2^{80/8}=1024 的码本。对于目标速率预算r，参数N_q控制计算复杂度与编码效率之间的权衡，我们在第V-D节中对此进行研究。

items.en: The codebook of each quantizer is trained with exponential moving average updates, following the method proposed in VQ-VAE-2 [32]. To improve the usage of the codebooks we use two additional methods. First, instead of using a random initialization for the codebook vectors, we run the k-means algorithm on the first training batch and use the learned centroids as initialization. This allows the codebook to be close to the distribution of its inputs and improves its usage. Second, as proposed in [34], when a codebook vector has not been assigned any input frame for several batches, we replace it with an input frame randomly sampled within the current batch. More precisely, we track the exponential moving average of the assignments to each vector (with a decay factor of 0.990.990.99) and replace the vectors of which this statistic falls below 222.
items.zh: 每个量化器的码本使用指数移动平均更新进行训练，遵循VQ-VAE-2[32]提出的方法。为改善码本使用率，我们使用两种额外方法。首先，我们不使用随机初始化码本向量，而是在第一个训练批次上运行k-means算法，并使用学习到的质心作为初始化。这使码本接近其输入分布并提高使用率。其次，如[34]所提议，当一个码本向量在多个批次中未被分配任何输入帧时，我们将其替换为当前批次中随机采样的输入帧。更准确地说，我们跟踪每个向量分配的指数移动平均（衰减因子0.99），并替换该统计量低于2的向量。

items.en: Enabling bitrate scalability with quantizer dropout – Residual vector quantization provides a convenient framework for controlling the bitrate. For a fixed size N𝑁N of each codebook, the number of VQ layers Nqsubscript𝑁𝑞N_{q} determines the bitrate. Since the vector quantizers are trained jointly with the encoder/decoder, in principle a different SoundStream model should be trained for each target bitrate. Instead, having a single bitrate scalable model that can operate at several target bitrates is much more practical, since this reduces the memory footprint needed to store model parameters both at the encoder and decoder side.
items.zh: 通过量化器dropout实现比特率可扩展性——残差向量量化为控制比特率提供了便捷框架。对于每个码本的固定大小N，VQ层数N_q决定比特率。由于向量量化器与编码器/解码器联合训练，原则上应为每个目标比特率训练不同的SoundStream模型。相反，拥有一个可在多个目标比特率下运行的单一比特率可扩展模型更为实用，因为这减少了编码器和解码器侧存储模型参数所需的内存占用。

items.en: To train such a model, we modify Algorithm 1 in the following way: for each input example, we sample nqsubscript𝑛𝑞n_{q} uniformly at random in [1;Nq]1subscript𝑁𝑞[1;N_{q}] and only use quantizers Qisubscript𝑄𝑖Q_{i} for i=1​…​nq𝑖1…subscript𝑛𝑞i=1\dots n_{q}. This can be seen as a form of structured dropout [43] applied to quantization layers. Consequently, the model is trained to encode and decode audio for all target bitrates corresponding to the range nq=1​…​Nqsubscript𝑛𝑞1…subscript𝑁𝑞n_{q}=1\dots N_{q}. During inference, the value of nqsubscript𝑛𝑞n_{q} is selected based on the desired bitrate. Previous models for neural compression have relied on product quantization (wav2vec 2.0 [44]), or on concatenating the output of several VQ layers [5, 6]. With such approaches, changing the bitrate requires either changing the architecture of the encoder and/or the decoder, as the dimensionality changes, or retraining an appropriate codebook. A key advantage of our residual vector quantizer is that the dimensionality of the embeddings does not change with the bitrate. Indeed, the additive composition of the outputs of each VQ layer progressively refines the quantized embeddings, while keeping the same shape. Hence, no architectural changes are needed in neither the encoder nor the decoder to accommodate different bitrates. In Section V-C, we show that this method allows one to train a single SoundStream model, which matches the performance of models trained specifically for a given bitrate.
items.zh: 为训练这样的模型，我们按如下方式修改算法1：对于每个输入样本，我们在[1; N_q]中均匀随机采样n_q，并仅使用量化器Q_i，i=1…n_q。这可以看作是一种应用于量化层的结构化dropout[43]。因此，模型被训练为对所有对应n_q=1…N_q范围的目标比特率进行音频编码和解码。推理时，根据所需比特率选择n_q的值。先前的神经压缩模型依赖于乘积量化（wav2vec 2.0 [44]）或连接多个VQ层的输出[5,6]。使用这些方法，改变比特率需要改变编码器和/或解码器的架构（因为维度变化），或重新训练适当的码本。我们的残差向量量化器的一个关键优势是嵌入的维度不随比特率变化。实际上，每个VQ层输出的加性组合逐步细化量化嵌入，同时保持相同形状。因此，编码器和解码器均无需架构更改以适应不同比特率。在第V-C节中，我们展示了该方法允许训练单个SoundStream模型，其性能与针对特定比特率训练的模型相匹配。

items.en: To compute the adversarial losses described in Section III-E, we define two different discriminators: i) a wave-based discriminator, which receives as input a single waveform; ii) an STFT-based discriminator, which receives as input the complex-valued STFT of the input waveform, expressed in terms of real and imaginary parts. Since both discriminators are fully convolutional, the number of logits in the output is proportional to the length of the input audio.
items.zh: 为计算第III-E节所述的对抗损失，我们定义了两个不同的判别器：i) 基于波形的判别器，接收单个波形作为输入；ii) 基于STFT的判别器，接收输入波形的复值STFT（以实部和虚部表示）作为输入。由于两个判别器都是全卷积的，输出中的logits数量与输入音频长度成正比。

items.en: For the wave-based discriminator, we use the same multi-resolution convolutional discriminator proposed in [15] and adopted in [45]. Three structurally identical models are applied to the input audio at different resolutions: original, 2-times down-sampled, and 4-times down-sampled. Each single-scale discriminator consists of an initial plain convolution followed by four grouped convolutions, each of which has a group size of 4, a down-sampling factor of 4, and a channel multiplier of 4 up to a maximum of 1024 output channels. They are followed by two more plain convolution layers to produce the final output, i.e., the logits.
items.zh: 对于基于波形的判别器，我们使用文献[15]提出并被[45]采用的多分辨率卷积判别器。三个结构相同的模型应用于不同分辨率的输入音频：原始、2倍下采样和4倍下采样。每个单尺度判别器由一个初始普通卷积后跟四个分组卷积组成，每个分组卷积的分组大小为4，下采样因子为4，通道乘数为4，最多1024个输出通道。之后是两个普通卷积层以产生最终输出，即logits。

items.en: The STFT-based discriminator is illustrated in Figure 4 and operates on a single scale, computing the STFT with a window length of W=1024𝑊1024W=1024 samples and a hop length of H=256𝐻256H=256 samples. A 2D-convolution (with kernel size 7×7777\times 7 and 32 channels) is followed by a sequence of residual blocks. Each block starts with a 3×3333\times 3 convolution, followed by a 3×4343\times 4 or a 4×4444\times 4 convolution, with strides equal to (1,2)12(1,2) or (2,2)22(2,2), where (st,sf)subscript𝑠𝑡subscript𝑠𝑓(s_{t},s_{f}) indicates the down-sampling factor along the time axis and the frequency axis. We alternate between (1,2)12(1,2) and (2,2)22(2,2) strides, for a total of 6 residual blocks. The number of channels is progressively increased with the depth of the network. At the output of the last residual block, the activations have shape T/(H⋅23)×F/26𝑇⋅𝐻superscript23𝐹superscript26T/(H\cdot 2^{3})\times F/2^{6}, where T𝑇T is the number of samples in the time domain and F=W/2𝐹𝑊2F=W/2 is the number of frequency bins. The last layer aggregates the logits across the (down-sampled) frequency bins with a fully connected layer (implemented as a 1×F/261𝐹superscript261\times F/2^{6} convolution), to obtain a 1-dimensional signal in the (down-sampled) time domain.
items.zh: 基于STFT的判别器如图4所示，在单尺度上操作，使用窗口长度W=1024样本和跳跃长度H=256样本计算STFT。一个二维卷积（核大小7×7，32通道）后跟一系列残差块。每个块以3×3卷积开始，后跟3×4或4×4卷积，步长为(1,2)或(2,2)，其中(s_t, s_f)表示沿时间轴和频率轴的下采样因子。我们交替使用(1,2)和(2,2)步长，共6个残差块。通道数随网络深度逐渐增加。在最后一个残差块的输出处，激活形状为 T/(H·2^3) × F/2^6，其中T是时域样本数，F=W/2是频率仓数。最后一层通过全连接层（实现为1×F/2^6卷积）聚合跨（下采样）频率仓的logits，以获得（下采样）时域的一维信号。

items.en: Let 𝒢(x)=dec(Q(enc(x))\mathcal{G}(x)=\text{dec}(Q(\text{enc}(x)) denote the SoundStream generator, which processes the input waveform x𝑥x through the encoder, the quantizer and the decoder, and x^=𝒢​(x)^𝑥𝒢𝑥\hat{x}=\mathcal{G}(x) be the decoded waveform. We train SoundStream with a mix of losses to achieve both signal reconstruction fidelity and perceptual quality, following the principles of the perception-distortion trade-off discussed in [46].
items.zh: 令 𝒢(x)=dec(Q(enc(x))) 表示SoundStream生成器，它通过编码器、量化器和解码器处理输入波形x，并令 x̂=𝒢(x) 为解码后的波形。我们使用混合损失训练SoundStream，以实现信号重建保真度和感知质量，遵循文献[46]中讨论的感知-失真权衡原则。

items.en: The adversarial loss is used to promote perceptual quality and it is defined as a hinge loss over the logits of the discriminator, averaged over multiple discriminators and over time. More formally, let k∈{0,…,K}𝑘0…𝐾k\in\{0,\dots,K\} index over the individual discriminators, where k=0𝑘0k=0 denotes the STFT-based discriminator and k∈{1,…,K}𝑘1…𝐾k\in\{1,\dots,K\} the different resolutions of the waveform-based discriminator (K=3𝐾3K=3 in our case). Let Tksubscript𝑇𝑘T_{k} denote the number of logits at the output of the k𝑘k-th discriminator along the time dimension. The discriminator is trained to classify original vs. decoded audio, by minimizing

items.en: To promote fidelity of the decoded signal x^^𝑥\hat{x} with respect to the original x𝑥x we adopt two additional losses: i) a “feature” loss ℒ𝒢featsuperscriptsubscriptℒ𝒢feat\mathcal{L}_{\mathcal{G}}^{\text{feat}}, computed in the feature space defined by the discriminator(s) [15]; ii) a multi-scale spectral reconstruction loss ℒ𝒢recsuperscriptsubscriptℒ𝒢rec\mathcal{L}_{\mathcal{G}}^{\text{rec}} [47].
items.zh: 为了提升解码信号x̂相对于原始信号x的保真度，我们采用两个额外的损失：i) 在判别器定义的特征空间中计算的“特征”损失L_G^feat [15]；ii) 多尺度频谱重构损失L_G^rec [47]。

items.en: More specifically, the feature loss is computed by taking the average absolute difference between the discriminator’s internal layer outputs for the generated audio and those for the corresponding target audio.
items.zh: 更具体地，特征损失通过计算生成音频与对应目标音频在判别器内部层输出之间的平均绝对差值得到。

items.en: where L𝐿L is the number of internal layers, 𝒟k,t(l)superscriptsubscript𝒟𝑘𝑡𝑙\mathcal{D}_{k,t}^{(l)} (l∈{1,…,L}𝑙1…𝐿l\in\{1,\dots,L\}) is the t𝑡t-th output of layer l𝑙l of discriminator k𝑘k, and Tk,lsubscript𝑇𝑘𝑙T_{k,l} denotes the length of the layer in the time dimension.

full.secZh: 三-F 联合压缩与增强

items.en: In traditional audio processing pipelines, compression and enhancement are typically performed by different modules. For example, it is possible to apply an audio enhancement algorithm at the transmitter side, before audio is compressed, or at the receiver side, after audio is decoded. In this setup, each processing step contributes to the end-to-end latency, e.g., due to buffering the input audio to the expected frame length determined by the specific algorithm adopted. Conversely, we design SoundStream in such a way that compression and enhancement can be carried out jointly by the same model, without increasing the overall latency.
items.zh: 在传统音频处理流程中，压缩和增强通常由不同模块执行。例如，可以在发射端（音频压缩前）或接收端（音频解码后）应用音频增强算法。在此设置中，每个处理步骤都会增加端到端延迟，例如由于需要将输入音频缓冲到特定算法所期望的帧长度。相反，我们设计的SoundStream使得压缩和增强可以由同一模型联合执行，而不增加整体延迟。

items.en: The nature of the enhancement can be determined by the choice of the training data. As a concrete example, in this paper we show that it is possible to combine compression with background noise suppression. More specifically, we train a model in such a way that one can flexibly enable or disable denoising at inference time, by feeding a conditioning signal that represents the two modes (denoising enabled or disabled). To this end, we prepare the training data to consist of tuples of the form: (inputs,targets,denoise)inputstargetsdenoise(\texttt{inputs},\texttt{targets},\texttt{denoise}). When denoise=falsedenoisefalse\texttt{denoise}=\texttt{false}, targets=inputstargetsinputs\texttt{targets}=\texttt{inputs}; when denoise=truedenoisetrue\texttt{denoise}=\texttt{true}, targets contain the clean speech component of the corresponding inputs. Hence, the network is trained to reconstruct noisy speech if the conditioning signal is disabled, and to produce a clean version of the noisy input if it is enabled. Note that when inputs consist of clean audio (speech or music), targets=inputstargetsinputs\texttt{targets}=\texttt{inputs} and denoise can be either true or false. This is done to prevent SoundStream from adversely affecting clean audio when denoising is enabled.
items.zh: 增强的性质可以通过训练数据的选择来确定。作为一个具体例子，本文展示了将压缩与背景噪声抑制相结合的可能性。更具体地，我们训练一个模型，使其在推理时能够通过输入表示两种模式（启用或禁用降噪）的条件信号来灵活地启用或禁用降噪。为此，我们准备训练数据，使其由以下形式的元组组成：(inputs, targets, denoise)。当denoise=false时，targets=inputs；当denoise=true时，targets包含对应输入中的干净语音成分。因此，网络被训练为：如果条件信号禁用，则重构带噪语音；如果启用，则生成带噪输入的干净版本。注意，当输入为干净音频（语音或音乐）时，targets=inputs，denoise可以为true或false。这是为了防止SoundStream在启用降噪时对干净音频产生不利影响。

items.en: To process the conditioning signal, we use Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) layers [49] in between residual units, which take network features as inputs and transform them as
items.zh: 为了处理条件信号，我们在残差单元之间使用特征线性调制（FiLM）层[49]，该层将网络特征作为输入并对其进行变换：

items.en: where an,csubscript𝑎𝑛𝑐a_{n,c} is the nthsuperscript𝑛thn^{\rm th} activation in the cthsuperscript𝑐thc^{\rm th} channel. The coefficients γn,csubscript𝛾𝑛𝑐\gamma_{n,c} and βn,csubscript𝛽𝑛𝑐\beta_{n,c} are computed by a linear layer that takes as input a (potentially time-varying) two-dimensional one-hot encoding that determines the denoising mode. This allows one to adjust the level of denoising over time.
items.zh: 其中a_{n,c}是第c个通道的第n个激活。系数γ_{n,c}和β_{n,c}由一个线性层计算，该线性层输入一个（可能随时间变化的）二维独热编码，用于确定降噪模式。这使得可以随时间调整降噪水平。

items.en: In principle, FiLM layers can be used anywhere throughout the encoder and decoder architecture. However, in our preliminary experiments, we found that applying conditioning at the bottleneck either at the encoder or at the decoder side (as illustrated in Figure 3) was effective and no further improvements were observed by applying FiLM layers at different depths. In Section V-E, we quantify the impact of enabling denoising at either the encoder or decoder side both in terms of audio quality and bitrate.
items.zh: 原则上，FiLM层可以用于编码器和解码器架构的任何位置。然而，在我们的初步实验中，我们发现将条件应用于瓶颈处（编码器或解码器侧，如图3所示）是有效的，而在不同深度应用FiLM层并未观察到进一步改进。在第五节E中，我们量化了在编码器或解码器侧启用降噪对音频质量和比特率的影响。

items.en: We train SoundStream on three types of audio content: clean speech, noisy speech and music, all at 242424\,kHz sampling rate. For clean speech, we use the LibriTTS dataset [50]. For noisy speech, we synthesize samples by mixing speech from LibriTTS with noise from Freesound [51]. We apply peak normalization to randomly selected crops of 3 seconds and adjust the mixing gain of the noise component sampling uniformly in the interval [−30​dB,0​dB]30dB0dB[-30\,\text{dB},0\,\text{dB}]. For music, we use the MagnaTagATune dataset [52]. We evaluate our models on disjoint test splits of the datasets above. In addition, we collected a real-world dataset, which contains both near-field and far-field (reverberant) speech, with background noise in some of the examples. Unless stated otherwise, objective and subjective metrics are computed on a set of 200 audio clips 2-4 seconds long, with 50 samples from each of the four datasets listed above (i.e., clean speech, noisy speech, music, noisy/reverberant speech).
items.zh: 我们在三种类型的音频内容上训练SoundStream：干净语音、带噪语音和音乐，采样率均为24 kHz。对于干净语音，我们使用LibriTTS数据集[50]。对于带噪语音，我们通过将LibriTTS的语音与Freesound[51]的噪声混合来合成样本。我们对随机选择的3秒片段应用峰值归一化，并在区间[-30 dB, 0 dB]内均匀采样噪声分量的混合增益。对于音乐，我们使用MagnaTagATune数据集[52]。我们在上述数据集的独立测试集上评估模型。此外，我们收集了一个真实世界数据集，包含近场和远场（混响）语音，部分示例带有背景噪声。除非另有说明，客观和主观指标是在200个2-4秒的音频片段上计算的，其中50个样本来自上述四个数据集（即干净语音、带噪语音、音乐、带噪/混响语音）。

items.en: To evaluate SoundStream, we perform subjective evaluations by human raters. We have chosen a crowd-sourced methodology inspired by MUSHRA [53], with a hidden reference but no lowpass-filtered anchor. Each of the 200 samples of the evaluation dataset, which include clean, noisy and reverberant speech, as well as music, was rated 20 times. The raters were required to be native English speakers and be using headphones. Additionally, to avoid noisy data, a post-screening was put in place to exclude ratings by listeners who rated the reference below 90 more than 20% of the time or rated non-reference samples above 90 more than 50% of the time.
items.zh: 为了评估SoundStream，我们通过人类评分员进行主观评估。我们选择了一种受MUSHRA[53]启发的众包方法，包含隐藏参考但无低通滤波锚点。评估数据集的200个样本（包括干净、带噪和混响语音以及音乐）每个被评分20次。评分员要求是英语母语者并使用耳机。此外，为避免噪声数据，我们设置了事后筛选，排除那些超过20%的时间将参考评分低于90，或超过50%的时间将非参考样本评分高于90的评分员的评分。

items.en: For development and hyperparameter selection, we rely on computational, objective metrics. Numerous metrics have been developed in the past for assessing the perceived similarity between a reference and a processed audio signal. The ITU-T standards PESQ [54] and its replacement POLQA [55] are commonly used metrics. However, both are inconvenient to use owing to licensing restrictions. We choose the freely available and recently open-sourced ViSQOL [56, 57] metric, which has previously shown comparable performance to POLQA. In early experiments, we found this metric to be strongly correlated with subjective evaluations. We thus use it for model selection and ablation studies.
items.zh: 对于开发和超参数选择，我们依赖计算客观指标。过去已开发出许多用于评估参考信号与处理后信号之间感知相似度的指标。ITU-T标准PESQ[54]及其替代品POLQA[55]是常用的指标。然而，由于许可限制，两者使用不便。我们选择免费可用且最近开源的ViSQOL[56, 57]指标，该指标先前显示出与POLQA相当的性能。在早期实验中，我们发现该指标与主观评估高度相关。因此，我们将其用于模型选择和消融研究。

items.en: Opus [9] is a versatile speech and audio codec supporting signal bandwidths from 4 kHz to 24 kHz and bitrates from 6 kbps to 510 kbps. Since its standardization by the IETF in 2012 it has been widely deployed for speech communication over the internet. As the audio codec in applications such as Zoom and applications based on WebRTC [58, 59], such as Microsoft Teams and Google Meet, Opus has hundreds of millions of daily users. Opus is also one of the main audio codecs used in YouTube for streaming. Enhanced Voice Services (EVS) [10] is the latest codec standardized by the 3GPP and was primarily designed for Voice over LTE (VoLTE). Like Opus, it is a versatile codec operating at multiple signal bandwidths, 4 kHz to 20 kHz, and bitrates, 5.9 kbps to 128 kbps. It is replacing AMR-WB [60] and retains full backward operability. In this paper we utilize these two systems as baselines for comparison with the SoundStream codec. For the lowest bitrates, we also compare the performance of the recently presented Lyra codec [8] which is an autoregressive generative codec operating at 3 kbps. We provide audio processed by SoundStream and baselines at different bitrates on a public webpage111https://google-research.github.io/seanet/soundstream/examples/.
items.zh: Opus [9] 是一种多功能的语音和音频编解码器，支持从 4 kHz 到 24 kHz 的信号带宽以及从 6 kbps 到 510 kbps 的比特率。自 2012 年由 IETF 标准化以来，它已广泛部署于互联网上的语音通信。作为 Zoom 等应用以及基于 WebRTC [58, 59] 的应用（如 Microsoft Teams 和 Google Meet）中的音频编解码器，Opus 拥有数亿日活跃用户。Opus 也是 YouTube 用于流媒体的主要音频编解码器之一。增强语音服务 (EVS) [10] 是 3GPP 标准化的最新编解码器，主要设计用于 LTE 语音 (VoLTE)。与 Opus 类似，它是一种多功能编解码器，支持多种信号带宽（4 kHz 到 20 kHz）和比特率（5.9 kbps 到 128 kbps）。它正在取代 AMR-WB [60] 并保持完全的向后兼容性。在本文中，我们利用这两个系统作为与 SoundStream 编解码器比较的基线。对于最低比特率，我们还比较了最近提出的 Lyra 编解码器 [8] 的性能，这是一种以 3 kbps 运行的自回归生成式编解码器。我们在公共网页上提供了由 SoundStream 和基线在不同比特率下处理的音频。

items.capEn: Figure 7: ViSQOL vs. bitrate. a) SoundStream performance on test data, comparing the actual bitrate with the potential bitrate savings achievable by entropy coding b) ViSQOL scores by content type c) Comparison of SoundStream models that are trained at 181818\,kbps with quantizer dropout (bitrate scalable), without quantizer dropout (not bitrate scalable) and evaluated with a variable number of quantizers, or trained and evaluated at a fixed bitrate (bitrate specific). Error bars denote 95%percent9595\% confidence intervals.
items.capZh: 图 7: ViSQOL vs. 比特率。a) SoundStream 在测试数据上的性能，比较实际比特率与通过熵编码可实现的潜在比特率节省。b) 按内容类型划分的 ViSQOL 分数。c) 使用量化器 dropout（比特率可扩展）、不使用量化器 dropout（不可比特率扩展）并以可变数量量化器评估的 SoundStream 模型，与在固定比特率下训练和评估（特定比特率）的模型的比较。误差线表示 95% 置信区间。

items.en: We also investigate the rate-quality tradeoff achieved when encoding different content types, as illustrated in Figure 7b. Unsurprisingly, the highest quality is achieved when encoding clean speech. Music represents a more challenging case, due to its inherent diversity of content.
items.zh: 我们还研究了编码不同内容类型时实现的率-质量权衡，如图 7b 所示。毫不意外，编码干净语音时质量最高。音乐由于其内容的固有多样性，是一个更具挑战性的情况。

full.secZh: 五-C 比特率可扩展性

items.en: We investigate the bitrate scalability provided by training a single model that can serve different bitrates. To evaluate this aspect, for each bitrate R𝑅R we consider three SoundStream configurations: a) a non-scalable model trained and evaluated at bitrate R𝑅R (bitrate specific); b) a non-scalable model trained at 18 kbps and evaluated at bitrate R𝑅R by using only the first nqsubscript𝑛𝑞n_{q} quantizers during inference (18 kbps - no dropout); c) a scalable model trained with quantizer dropout and evaluated at bitrate R𝑅R (bitrate scalable). Figure 7c shows the ViSQOL scores for these three scenarios. Remarkably, a model trained specifically at 18 kbps retains good performance when evaluated at lower bitrates, even though the model was not trained in these conditions. Unsurprisingly, the quality drop increases as the bitrate decreases, i.e., when there is a more significant difference between training and inference. This gap vanishes when using the quantizer dropout strategy described in Section III-C. Surprisingly, the bitrate scalable model seems to marginally outperform bitrate specific models at 9 kbps and 12 kbps. This suggests that quantizer dropout, beyond providing bitrate scalability, may act as a regularizer.
items.zh: 我们研究了通过训练一个单一模型来服务不同比特率所提供的比特率可扩展性。为了评估这一方面，对于每个比特率 R，我们考虑三种 SoundStream 配置：a) 在比特率 R 下训练和评估的非可扩展模型（特定比特率）；b) 在 18 kbps 下训练并在推理时仅使用前 n_q 个量化器以比特率 R 评估的非可扩展模型（18 kbps - 无 dropout）；c) 使用量化器 dropout 训练并以比特率 R 评估的可扩展模型（比特率可扩展）。图 7c 显示了这三种场景的 ViSQOL 分数。值得注意的是，专门在 18 kbps 下训练的模型在较低比特率下评估时仍保持良好的性能，尽管模型并未在这些条件下训练。毫不意外，随着比特率降低，即训练与推理之间的差异更大时，质量下降增加。当使用第 III-C 节描述的量化器 dropout 策略时，这种差距消失。令人惊讶的是，比特率可扩展模型在 9 kbps 和 12 kbps 时似乎略微优于特定比特率模型。这表明量化器 dropout 除了提供比特率可扩展性外，还可能起到正则化作用。

items.en: We confirm these results by including the bitrate scalable variant of SoundStream in the MUSHRA subjective evaluation (see Figure 5). When operating at 333\,kbps, the bitrate scalable variant of SoundStream is only slightly worse than the bitrate specific variant. Conversely, both at 6 kbps and 12 kbps it matches the same quality as the bitrate specific variant.
items.zh: 我们通过将 SoundStream 的比特率可扩展变体纳入 MUSHRA 主观评估（见图 5）来确认这些结果。在 3 kbps 运行时，SoundStream 的比特率可扩展变体仅略差于特定比特率变体。相反，在 6 kbps 和 12 kbps 时，它与特定比特率变体的质量相同。

items.en: We carried out several additional experiments to evaluate the impact of some of the design choices applied to SoundStream. Unless stated otherwise, all these experiments operate at 666\,kbps.
items.zh: 我们进行了几项额外实验，以评估应用于 SoundStream 的某些设计选择的影响。除非另有说明，所有这些实验均在 6 kbps 下运行。

items.en: Advantage of learning the encoder – We explored the impact of replacing the learnable encoder of SoundStream with a fixed mel-filterbank, similarly to Lyra [8]. We learned both the quantizer and the decoder and observed a significant drop in objective quality, with ViSQOL going from 3.96 to 3.33. Note that this is significantly worse than what can be achieved when learning the encoder and halving the bitrate (i.e., ViSQOL equal to 3.76 at 333\,kbps). This demonstrates that the additional complexity of having a learnable encoder translates to a very significant improvement in the rate-quality trade-off.
items.zh: 学习编码器的优势——我们探讨了将 SoundStream 的可学习编码器替换为固定 mel 滤波器组（类似于 Lyra [8]）的影响。我们学习了量化器和解码器，并观察到客观质量显著下降，ViSQOL 从 3.96 降至 3.33。请注意，这比学习编码器并将比特率减半（即 ViSQOL 在 3 kbps 时为 3.76）所能达到的效果差得多。这表明，拥有可学习编码器的额外复杂性转化为率-质量权衡的非常显著的改进。

items.en: The main drawback of using a learnable encoder is the computational cost of the neural architecture, which can be significantly higher than computing fixed, non-learnable features such as mel-filterbanks. For SoundStream to be competitive with traditional codecs, not only should it provide a better perceptual quality at an equivalent bitrate, but it must also run in real-time on resource-limited hardware. Table I shows how computational efficiency and audio quality are impacted by the number of channels in the encoder Cencsubscript𝐶encC_{\text{enc}} and the decoder Cdecsubscript𝐶decC_{\text{dec}}. We measured the real-time factor (RTF), defined as the ratio between the temporal length of the input audio and the time needed for encoding/decoding it with SoundStream. We profiled these models on a single CPU thread of a Pixel4 smartphone. We observe that the default model (Cenc=Cdec=32subscript𝐶encsubscript𝐶dec32C_{\text{enc}}=C_{\text{dec}}=32) runs in real-time (RTF >2.3×>2.3\times). Decreasing the model capacity by setting Cenc=Cdec=16subscript𝐶encsubscript𝐶dec16C_{\text{enc}}=C_{\text{dec}}=16 only marginally affects the reconstruction quality while increasing the real-time factor significantly (RTF >7.1×>7.1\times). We also investigated configurations with asymmetric model capacities. Using a smaller encoder, it is possible to achieve a significant speedup without sacrificing quality (ViSQOL drops from 3.96 to 3.94, while the encoder RTF increases to 18.6×18.6\times). Instead, decreasing the capacity of the decoder has a more significant impact on quality (ViSQOL drops from 3.96 to 3.84). This is aligned with recent findings in the field of neural image compression [61], which also adopt a lighter encoder and a heavier decoder.
items.zh: 使用可学习编码器的主要缺点是神经架构的计算成本，这可能远高于计算固定、不可学习的特征（如 mel 滤波器组）。为了使 SoundStream 与传统编解码器竞争，它不仅应在等效比特率下提供更好的感知质量，而且还必须在资源受限的硬件上实时运行。表 I 显示了编码器通道数 C_enc 和解码器通道数 C_dec 如何影响计算效率和音频质量。我们测量了实时因子 (RTF)，定义为输入音频的时间长度与使用 SoundStream 编码/解码所需时间之比。我们在 Pixel4 智能手机的单个 CPU 线程上对这些模型进行了性能分析。我们观察到，默认模型 (C_enc = C_dec = 32) 实时运行 (RTF > 2.3×)。通过设置 C_enc = C_dec = 16 来降低模型容量，仅轻微影响重建质量，同时显著提高实时因子 (RTF > 7.1×)。我们还研究了非对称模型容量的配置。使用较小的编码器，可以在不牺牲质量的情况下实现显著的加速（ViSQOL 从 3.96 降至 3.94，而编码器 RTF 增加到 18.6×）。相反，降低解码器的容量对质量有更显著的影响（ViSQOL 从 3.96 降至 3.84）。这与神经图像压缩领域的最新发现 [61] 一致，该领域也采用更轻量的编码器和更重的解码器。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Performance of SoundStream when performing joint compression and background noise suppression, measured by ViSQOL scores at different bitrates. We compare three variants: a) flexible denoising, where the conditioning is added at the encoder side; b) flexible denoising, where the conditioning is added at the decoder side; and c) fixed denoising, where the model was trained to always produce clean outputs. For all models we also report the potential bitrate savings achievable by entropy coding (EC). Error bars denote 95%percent9595\% confidence intervals.
items.capZh: 图 8: SoundStream 在执行联合压缩和背景噪声抑制时的性能，通过不同比特率下的 ViSQOL 分数衡量。我们比较了三种变体：a) 灵活去噪，其中条件化添加在编码器侧；b) 灵活去噪，其中条件化添加在解码器侧；c) 固定去噪，其中模型被训练为始终产生干净输出。对于所有模型，我们还报告了通过熵编码 (EC) 可实现的潜在比特率节省。误差线表示 95% 置信区间。

items.en: Vector quantizer depth and codebook size – The number of bits used to encode a single frame is equal to Nq​log2⁡Nsubscript𝑁𝑞subscript2𝑁N_{q}\log_{2}N, where Nqsubscript𝑁𝑞N_{q} denotes the number of quantizers and N𝑁N the codebook size. Hence, it is possible to achieve the same target bitrate for different combinations of Nqsubscript𝑁𝑞N_{q} and N𝑁N. Table II shows three configurations, all operating at 666\,kbps. As expected, using fewer vector quantizers, each with a larger codebook, achieves the highest coding efficiency at the cost of higher computational complexity. Remarkably, using a sequence of 80 1-bit quantizers leads only to a modest quality degradation. This demonstrates that it is possible to successfully train very deep residual vector quantizers without facing optimization issues. On the other side, as discussed in Section III-C, growing the codebook size can quickly lead to unmanageable memory requirements. Thus, the proposed residual vector quantizer offers a practical and effective solution for learning neural codecs operating at high bitrates, as it scales gracefully when using many quantizers, each with a smaller codebook.
items.zh: 向量量化器深度和码本大小——用于编码单个帧的比特数等于 N_q log_2 N，其中 N_q 表示量化器数量，N 表示码本大小。因此，对于 N_q 和 N 的不同组合，可以实现相同的目标比特率。表 II 显示了三种配置，均在 6 kbps 下运行。正如预期，使用更少的向量量化器，每个具有更大的码本，以更高的计算复杂度为代价实现了最高的编码效率。值得注意的是，使用 80 个 1 比特量化器的序列仅导致适度的质量下降。这表明，可以成功训练非常深的残差向量量化器而不会遇到优化问题。另一方面，如第 III-C 节所述，增加码本大小会迅速导致难以管理的内存需求。因此，所提出的残差向量量化器为学习高比特率下的神经编解码器提供了一种实用且有效的解决方案，因为它在使用许多量化器（每个具有较小的码本）时能够优雅地扩展。

items.en: The architectural latency /of the model is defined by the product of the strides, as explained in Section III-A. In our default configuration, =/2⋅4⋅5⋅8=320=/2\cdot 4\cdot 5\cdot 8=320 samples, which means that one frame corresponds to 13.3msmillisecond\mathrm{ms} of audio at 242424\,kHz. The bit budget allocated to the residual vector quantizer needs to be adjusted based on the target architectural latency. For example, when operating at 666\,kbps, the residual vector quantizer has a budget of 80 bits per frame. If we double the latency, one frame corresponds to 26.6msmillisecond\mathrm{ms}, so the per-frame budget needs to be increased to 160 bits. Table III compares three configurations, all operating at 666\,kbps, where the budget is adjusted by changing the number of quantizers, while keeping the codebook size fixed. We observe that these three configurations are equivalent in terms of audio quality. At the same time, increasing the latency of the model significantly increases the real-time factor, as encoding/decoding of a single frame corresponds to a longer audio sample.
items.zh: 模型的架构延迟由步长的乘积定义，如第 III-A 节所述。在我们的默认配置中，= /2·4·5·8 = 320 个样本，这意味着一个帧对应于 24 kHz 音频的 13.3 ms。分配给残差向量量化器的比特预算需要根据目标架构延迟进行调整。例如，在 6 kbps 下运行时，残差向量量化器每帧有 80 比特的预算。如果我们将延迟加倍，一个帧对应于 26.6 ms，因此每帧预算需要增加到 160 比特。表 III 比较了三种配置，均在 6 kbps 下运行，其中通过改变量化器数量来调整预算，同时保持码本大小固定。我们观察到，这三种配置在音频质量方面是等效的。同时，增加模型的延迟显著提高了实时因子，因为单个帧的编码/解码对应于更长的音频样本。

full.secZh: 五-E 联合压缩与增强

items.en: We evaluate a variant of SoundStream that is able to jointly perform compression and background noise suppression, which was trained as described in Section III-F. We consider two configurations, in which the conditioning signal is applied to the embeddings: i) one where the conditioning signal is added at the encoder side, just before quantization; ii) another where it is added at the decoder side. For each configuration, we train models at different bitrates. For evaluation we use 100010001000 samples of noisy speech, generated as described in Section IV-A and compute ViSQOL scores when denoising is enabled or disabled, using clean speech references as targets. Figures 8 shows a substantial improvement of quality when denoising is enabled, with no significant difference between denoising either at the encoder or at the decoder. We observe that the proposed model, which is able to flexibly enable or disable denoising at inference time, does not incur a cost in performance, when compared with a model in which denoising is always enabled. This can be seen comparing Figure 8c with Figure 8a and Figure 8b.
items.zh: 我们评估了 SoundStream 的一种变体，它能够联合执行压缩和背景噪声抑制，该变体按照第 III-F 节所述进行训练。我们考虑了两种配置，其中条件信号应用于嵌入：i) 一种是将条件信号添加在编码器侧，就在量化之前；ii) 另一种是将其添加在解码器侧。对于每种配置，我们在不同比特率下训练模型。为了评估，我们使用 1000 个带噪语音样本（按第 IV-A 节所述生成），并在启用或禁用去噪时计算 ViSQOL 分数，使用干净语音参考作为目标。图 8 显示，当启用去噪时，质量有显著改善，而在编码器或解码器处去噪之间没有显著差异。我们观察到，所提出的模型能够在推理时灵活地启用或禁用去噪，与始终启用去噪的模型相比，不会产生性能损失。这可以从比较图 8c 与图 8a 和图 8b 看出。

items.en: We also investigate whether denoising affects the potential bitrate savings that would be achievable by entropy coding. To evaluate this aspect, we first measured the empirical probability distributions pi(q),i=1​…​N,q=1​…​Nqformulae-sequencesuperscriptsubscript𝑝𝑖𝑞𝑖1…𝑁𝑞1…subscript𝑁𝑞p_{i}^{(q)},\,i=1\ldots N,\,q=1\ldots N_{q} on 3200 samples of training data. Then, we measured the empirical distribution ri(q)superscriptsubscript𝑟𝑖𝑞r_{i}^{(q)} on the 100010001000 test samples and computed the cross-entropy H​(r,p)=−∑i,qri(q)​log2⁡pi(q)𝐻𝑟𝑝subscript𝑖𝑞superscriptsubscript𝑟𝑖𝑞subscript2superscriptsubscript𝑝𝑖𝑞H(r,p)=-\sum_{i,q}r_{i}^{(q)}\log_{2}p_{i}^{(q)}, as an estimate of the bitrate lower bound needed to encode the test samples. Figure 8 shows that both the encoder-side denoising and fixed denoising offer substantial bitrate savings when compared with decoder-side denoising. Hence, applying denoising before quantization leads to a representation that can be encoded with fewer bits.
items.zh: 我们还研究了去噪是否影响通过熵编码可实现的潜在比特率节省。为了评估这一方面，我们首先在 3200 个训练数据样本上测量了经验概率分布 p_i^(q), i=1…N, q=1…N_q。然后，我们在 1000 个测试样本上测量了经验分布 r_i^(q)，并计算了交叉熵 H(r,p) = -∑_{i,q} r_i^(q) log_2 p_i^(q)，作为编码测试样本所需比特率下限的估计。图 8 显示，与解码器侧去噪相比，编码器侧去噪和固定去噪都提供了显著的比特率节省。因此，在量化之前应用去噪会导致可以用更少比特编码的表示。

full.sec: V-F Joint vs. disjoint compression and enhancement
full.secZh: 五-F 联合与分离压缩增强对比

items.en: We compare the proposed model, which is able to perform joint compression and enhancement, with a configuration in which compression is performed by SoundStream (with denoising disabled) and enhancement by a dedicated denoising model. For the latter, we adopt SEANet [45], which features a very similar model architecture, with the notable exception of skip connections between encoder and decoder layers and the absence of quantization. We consider two variants: i) one in which compression is followed by denoising (i.e., denoising is applied at the decoder side); ii) another one in which denoising is followed by compression (i.e., denoising is applied at the encoder side).
items.zh: 我们将所提出的能够执行联合压缩和增强的模型与一种配置进行比较，在该配置中，压缩由 SoundStream（禁用去噪）执行，增强由专门的去噪模型执行。对于后者，我们采用 SEANet [45]，它具有非常相似的模型架构，但值得注意的是，编码器和解码器层之间没有跳跃连接，并且没有量化。我们考虑两种变体：i) 一种是压缩后接去噪（即去噪应用于解码器侧）；ii) 另一种是去噪后接压缩（即去噪应用于编码器侧）。

items.en: We evaluate the different models using the VCTK dataset [62], which was neither used for training SoundStream nor SEANet. The input samples are 222\,s clips of noisy speech cropped to reduce periods of silence and resampled at 242424\,kHz. For each of the four input signal-to-noise ratios (000\,dB, 555\,dB, 101010\,dB and 151515\,dB), we run inference on 100010001000 samples and compute ViSQOL scores. As shown in Table IV, one single model trained for joint compression and enhancement achieves a level of quality that is almost on par with using two disjoint models. Also, the former requires only half of the computational cost and incurs no additional architectural latency, which would be introduced when stacking disjoint models. We also observe that the performance gap decreases as the input SNR increases.
items.zh: 我们使用 VCTK 数据集 [62] 评估不同的模型，该数据集既未用于训练 SoundStream 也未用于训练 SEANet。输入样本是 2 秒的带噪语音片段，经过裁剪以减少静音时段并重采样至 24 kHz。对于四个输入信噪比（0 dB、5 dB、10 dB 和 15 dB），我们在 1000 个样本上运行推理并计算 ViSQOL 分数。如表 IV 所示，一个用于联合压缩和增强的单一模型达到的质量水平几乎与使用两个分离模型相当。此外，前者只需要一半的计算成本，并且不会引入额外的架构延迟，而堆叠分离模型时会引入这种延迟。我们还观察到，随着输入 SNR 的增加，性能差距减小。

items.en: We propose SoundStream, a novel neural audio codec that outperforms state-of-the-art audio codecs over a wide range of bitrates and content types. SoundStream consists of an encoder, a residual vector quantizer and a decoder, which are trained end-to-end using a mix of adversarial and reconstruction losses to achieve superior audio quality. The model supports streamable inference and can run in real-time on a single smartphone CPU. When trained with quantizer dropout, a single SoundStream model achieves bitrate scalability with a minimal loss in performance when compared with bitrate-specific models. In addition, we show that it is possible to combine compression and enhancement in a single model without introducing additional latency.
items.zh: 我们提出了 SoundStream，一种新颖的神经音频编解码器，在广泛的比特率和内容类型上优于最先进的音频编解码器。SoundStream 由一个编码器、一个残差向量量化器和一个解码器组成，它们使用对抗损失和重建损失的混合进行端到端训练，以实现卓越的音频质量。该模型支持可流式推理，并且可以在单个智能手机 CPU 上实时运行。当使用量化器 dropout 训练时，单个 SoundStream 模型实现了比特率可扩展性，与特定比特率模型相比，性能损失最小。此外，我们表明，可以在单个模型中将压缩和增强结合起来，而不会引入额外的延迟。
